job_description:
• Or BS with 2+ years of relevant experience.
• Or equivalent combination of education and experience.
• Experience building and deploying end‑to‑end ML systems, or strong interest in developing production‑grade ML automation.
• Experience leading decision‑support, workflow‑automation, or data‑engineering initiatives in complex environments.
• Hands‑on experience designing, querying, and optimizing relational and NoSQL databases in production environments.
• Strong written and verbal communication skills with the ability to present complex analysis succinctly.
• Working knowledge of programming languages such as C#, Perl, Python, and VBA (Python preferred).
• Advanced data extraction, analysis, and reporting skills.
